feed.title: Michael Huang
feed.subtitle: A minimal, portfolio, sidebar, bootstrap Jekyll theme with responsive web design and focuses on text presentation.

entry.title: Machine-Generated Text Detection for ChatGPT
entry.summary: Report and Code In this blog, we have provided a brief overview of this interesting project and a taste of the preliminary analysis. For more detailed experiments, please refer to our full report here and code here. Author Haoquan Zhou (haoquanz@umich.edu) Kexuan Huang (hkx@umich.edu) Haoyang Ling (hyfrankl@umich.edu) Acknowledgement This project is a course project of SI630 Na...

entry.title: 🤖️ ChatGPT on WeChat: Turn your WeChat into ChatGPT! 🤖️

link.title: 🤖️ ChatGPT on WeChat: Turn your WeChat into ChatGPT! 🤖️

entry.summary: Acknowledgement & Features This project is implemented based on this amazing project that I contibuted before, with Wechaty SDK and OpenAI API, we achieve: fast and robust connection to a set of AI models with different features, typically gpt-3.5-turbo which powers ChatGPT stable and persistent deployment on cloud servers Railway You can find the source code in my Github ...

entry.title: Song Recommendation System Based on Big Data Analysis

link.title: Song Recommendation System Based on Big Data Analysis

entry.summary: This project is a course project in ECE4721J Methods and Tools for Big Data @UM-SJTU Joint Institute. In general, we built a song recommendation system based on big data analysis with several tools and algorithms on Million Song Dataset. You can find the source code in my Github repo. Project Goals Work with Hadoop, Drill and Spark Compare MapReduce and Spark Retrieve specific infor...

entry.title: IIFire: Intelligent firefighting system based on IoT & FAHP algorithm

link.title: IIFire: Intelligent firefighting system based on IoT & FAHP algorithm

entry.summary: This project is the capstone project for my bachelor’s degree @UM-SJTU Joint Institute, initiated by Prof. Mian Li. You can find the organization page on Github. Design Overview IIFire, or Intelligent IoT Firefighting System, is an integrated system deployed on government servers of Shanghai fire brigade, which detects potential fire hazard and report real-life fire alarms in building...

entry.title: SmarTemp: Temperature Measure & Manage Assistant
entry.summary: Design Background In COVID-19 pandemic, to prevent any potential spread of disease, it’s common in China to measure and record people’s body temperatures before getting into communities, schools, workplaces and public transportation. But it’s inefficient to do so manually with only pen and paper, especially when people are queuing up in morning peak (unfortunately this is most of the c...
